questions.question: Which header file is required to use vectors in C++?
questions.explanation: The <vector> header file provides the vector container class.

questions.question: How do you add an element to the end of a vector?
questions.explanation: The push_back() method adds an element to the end of a vector.

questions.question: What does STL stand for?
questions.explanation: STL stands for Standard Template Library, a collection of template classes and functions.

questions.question: Which STL container stores unique elements in sorted order?
questions.explanation: A set stores unique elements in sorted order automatically.

questions.question: What is the time complexity of accessing an element in a vector by index?
questions.explanation: Accessing an element by index in a vector is O(1) - constant time.
